Description of feedback, suggestion or c: The project started off well and is positively impacting community livelihoods. Description of actions taken: A-GRIP is a systems-strengthening initiative. It was advised that the sub-county lobby the District Local Government (DLG) and other development partners to mobilize resources for infrastructure development, including office space.
